verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The crowd was great but she knew she had to reach Him, For it was her last hope of ever being healed; So she pressed through the crowd until she touched His garment, And right there and then, her miracle was fulfilled.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: There's a miracle in the making, one just for you, Your Father is working it right now; Your prayers have been heard And the answer's on the way. There's a miracle in the making for you today.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Have you prayed and prayed but still you heard no answer, Has your faith grown weak and you feel you're walking all alone? Don't give up for the God you serve won't leave you, There's a miracle just for you, you've got to keep holding on.
